creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
=======================<phase: fetch          >============================
/usr/bin/fetch -Fpr -o "/portdistfiles/ftputil-2.6.tar.gz" "http://ftputil.sschwarzer.net/trac/attachment/wiki/Download/ftputil-2.6.tar.gz?format=raw"
Certificate verification failed for /C=US/O=Let's Encrypt/CN=Let's Encrypt Authority X3
34636967936:error:1416F086:SSL routines:tls_process_server_certificate:certificate verify failed:/usr/src/crypto/openssl/ssl/statem/statem_clnt.c:1925:
fetch: http://ftputil.sschwarzer.net/trac/attachment/wiki/Download/ftputil-2.6.tar.gz?format=raw: Authentication error
*** Error code 1

Probably misses something like FETCH_DEPENDS=security/ca_root_nss.
